meaning: n.行为似男孩的顽皮姑娘
examples: Jo was tall and thin and she was a tomboy.
I'm a tomboy from Nova Scotia.
Also, just because she's a tomboy doesn't mean a girl isn't well-mannered or polite.
When Carmela Spinelli hears the word "tomboy, " a particular look comes to mind: Strong, independent, rebellious.
One always knows with a tomboy: She is wearing shoes she can run away in.
